description: Pazaak-inspired bounded action cards for agentic task routing. Cards are small deterministic moves over a bitboard-style task state.

cards.name: Stand Hold
cards.effect: Hold a risky or under-evidenced lane without discarding it.

cards.name: Pass Continue
cards.effect: Leave a lane active when no intervention is needed.

cards.name: Focus Plus
cards.effect: Attach narrow context or focus paths to improve model signal.

cards.name: Verify Minus Risk
cards.effect: Run deterministic verifier, lookup table, tests, or parser gate before promotion.

cards.name: Swap Lane
cards.effect: Move the task to a better agent/model lane while preserving artifacts.

cards.name: Double Team
cards.effect: Run two independent agents on the same bounded subproblem and compare.

cards.name: Discard Branch
cards.effect: Prune a low-value or repeatedly failing branch.

cards.name: Claim Territory
cards.effect: Assign ownership of a repo/file/domain region to one lane to prevent conflicts.
